completion_data.completion_summary: Extended claude-memory-tracker pgrep pattern to include OpenCode processes and added opencode to the earlyoom --prefer list. Rebuilt Home Manager configuration, restarted monitoring services, and validated that OpenCode entries now appear in the CSV log. NixOS rebuild for earlyoom requires manual sudo execution.
roadmap_items: Review memory logs and design system optimizations

memory_candidates.content: When extending process monitoring scripts in NixOS/Home Manager, it is often simpler to expand an existing pgrep pattern rather than create a new service. This preserves systemd unit names, log files, and CSV schemas while minimizing migration risk.

For NixOS flake configurations, `home-manager switch --flake /path#user` can be run without sudo and will pick up home.nix changes, but `nixos-rebuild switch` requires sudo and may need manual execution if the agent lacks password access.
